subject: [PATCH v5 03/36] mm/page_alloc: let the bulk and folio allocators carry alloc_flags

2026-07-20.patch_summary: This patch allows the bulk and folio allocators to carry alloc_flags, which enables callers to select allocator behavior such as an alternate zonelist. The patch adds new functions in page_alloc.h that take an explicit alloc_flags parameter, matching the existing __alloc_pages_noprof function. The public gfp.h wrappers remain flag-free. This change does not introduce any functional changes, as all callers currently pass ALLOC_DEFAULT.
